title: Approximation
summary: Approximation represents values close enough for a defined purpose or tolerance.
claim: Approximation represents a value close enough to a target value for a defined purpose, tolerance, or measurement resolution.

proof_layers.summary: Approximation represents values close enough for a defined purpose or tolerance.
proof_layers.intuitive_explanation: Repeated measurement shows physical values often cannot be represented exactly; tolerances define practical adequacy.
proof_layers.formal_or_structural_proof: Repeated measurement shows physical values often cannot be represented exactly; tolerances define practical adequacy.
proof_layers.empirical_or_reconstruction_basis: Reconstructable with simple objects, marks, measurement, or geometric construction depending on the truth.
proof_layers.validation_assessment: Level 5 as a formal concept; practical use depends on measurement context.
